JetBrains project management and issue t: JetBrains project management and issue tracking for agile teams.
Your YouTrack URL (e.g. https://example.youtrack.cloud). Do NOT include /api.
From Profile -> Authentication -> Perman: From Profile -> Authentication -> Permanent Tokens. Starts with "perm:".
Connect your YouTrack instance.\n\n**How:
Connect your YouTrack instance.

**How to get your permanent token:**
1. Log in to your YouTrack instance
2. Click your avatar -> **Profile** -> **Authentication** tab
3. Click **New permanent token**
4. Name it (e.g. "Activepieces") and click **Create**
5. **Copy the token immediately** - it is shown only once
6. Paste it below with your Instance URL

Your **Instance URL** is your browser address, e.g. https://example.youtrack.cloud
Creates a new issue in a YouTrack projec: Creates a new issue in a YouTrack project.
Retrieves full details of an issue inclu: Retrieves full details of an issue including all custom field values.
Searches for issues using YouTrack query: Searches for issues using YouTrack query syntax. Returns flat rows for spreadsheets.
Updates an existing issue - summary, des: Updates an existing issue - summary, description, or custom fields.
Applies a YouTrack command to an issue (: Applies a YouTrack command to an issue (e.g. change state, assign, set sprint).
Adds an existing tag to an issue.
Removes a tag from an issue.
Creates a new tag in YouTrack.
Lists all tags visible to the current us: Lists all tags visible to the current user.
Uploads one or more files as attachments: Uploads one or more files as attachments to an existing issue.
Deletes an attachment from an issue.
Downloads an attachment from an issue an: Downloads an attachment from an issue and returns it as a Base64-encoded string. Use this with the "Upload to Drive" or "Send Email" actions in your flow.
Retrieves the full change history (activ: Retrieves the full change history (activity log) for a specific issue.
Adds a comment to an issue. Supports Mar: Adds a comment to an issue. Supports Markdown formatting.
Lists all comments on an issue with auth: Lists all comments on an issue with author details and timestamps.
Adds a user as a direct member of a proj: Adds a user as a direct member of a project team, giving them access to the project.
Creates a relationship between two issue: Creates a relationship between two issues (e.g. "relates to", "depends on", "is duplicated by").
Lists all attachments on a specific issu: Lists all attachments on a specific issue with metadata (name, size, type).
Make a custom API call to a specific end: Make a custom API call to a specific endpoint
Select the YouTrack project to work with: Select the YouTrack project to work with.
A short, one-line title for the issue.
Select the issue to work with.
Optional: filter by project. Leave empty: Optional: filter by project. Leave empty to search across all projects.
YouTrack search query. Examples:\n- #unr:
YouTrack search query. Examples:
- #unresolved — all unresolved issues
- assignee: me — assigned to you
- Priority: Critical — critical priority
- created: this week — created this week
- summary: login — issues mentioning "login"
Maximum issues to return. Default is 100: Maximum issues to return. Default is 100.
New summary. Leave empty to keep.
New description. Leave empty to keep.
YouTrack command. Examples: State Fixed: YouTrack command. Examples: State Fixed | assignee jane.doe | Priority Critical | for me Critical
Select a tag to apply to the issue.
Filter tags by name. Leave empty for all: Filter tags by name. Leave empty for all.
Add files to attach. Each needs a file n: Add files to attach. Each needs a file name and base64-encoded content.
The database ID of the attachment (e.g. "134-31"). You can find attachment IDs by using the "Get Issue" action — look for the attachment IDs in the output.
The attachment database ID (e.g. \"134-3: The attachment database ID (e.g. "134-31"). Use "List Attachments" to find it.
Select which types of activities to incl: Select which types of activities to include.
The comment text. Use Markdown for forma: The comment text. Use Markdown for formatting. Mention users with @username.
Restrict comment visibility to a group. Leave empty for everyone.
The readable ID of the issue to link to: The readable ID of the issue to link to (e.g. "NP-92"). You can find this in the issue URL or header.
The type of relationship between the iss: The type of relationship between the issues.
Authorization headers are injected autom: Authorization headers are injected automatically from your connection.
Enable for files like PDFs, images, etc.
HEAD: HEAD
Triggers when a new issue is created in: Triggers when a new issue is created in any project you can access.
Triggers when an existing issue is modif: Triggers when an existing issue is modified (summary, description, custom fields, etc.).
